description: Sends hook feedback messages from hook-started subagent sessions.

fn.description: Determines what action (function) should be executed. Supported values are the same as CSWFEEDBACK payloads in external hook scripts, including context, llm and response.

args.description: Arguments map with content depending on fn value.

id.description: Optional request id echoed in the response payload.

response.description: Ignored for this tool. Present only for compatibility with external hook script payloads.
